# CaseClassTypeInfo

####  abstract  class CaseClassTypeInfo[T <: Product] extends TupleTypeInfoBase[T]

TypeInformation for Case Classes. Creation and access is different from our Java Tuples so we have to treat them differently.

Annotations
     @Public()
